creator: flynn@energyhq.homeip.net
text:
Okay,

I've found a way around the fetch problem, thanks Dominic and Alan for the 
feedback. I've done it in a way that it will be very easy to adapt this 
Makefile for all the other ports from kde-look.

I've attached the relevant diff against the previous shar file.
